Our Community News.name: Community News Report
Our Community News.overview: Students create a short newspaper or digital newsletter about a community event, using the past simple tense and expressing likes/dislikes.
Our Community News.general_objective: Develop journalistic writing skills and community awareness.

Our Community News.name: Community Traditions Mural
Our Community News.overview: Students design a mural showcasing local traditions like Carnivals or Fiestas Patrias, adding captions with descriptive adjectives and past tense.
Our Community News.general_objective: Develop cultural appreciation and descriptive language skills.

Our Community News.name: Local Voices Podcast
Our Community News.overview: Students record a podcast describing local events and interviewing classmates, using past tense and likes/dislikes.
Our Community News.general_objective: Develop audio production and interview skills.

Keeping Our Communities Clean.name: Community Clean-Up Plan
Keeping Our Communities Clean.overview: Students use imperatives and modals to create a step-by-step digital plan outlining tasks and suggestions for cleaning their classroom.
Keeping Our Communities Clean.general_objective: Develop environmental planning and instructional design skills.

Keeping Our Communities Clean.name: School Clean-Up Day Poster
Keeping Our Communities Clean.overview: Students design posters promoting a school clean-up day, using future tense and time prepositions.
Keeping Our Communities Clean.general_objective: Develop promotional design and future tense application.

Keeping Our Communities Clean.name: Instructional Clean-Up Video
Keeping Our Communities Clean.overview: Students create an instructional video demonstrating cleaning tasks, using imperatives.
Keeping Our Communities Clean.general_objective: Develop video production and clear instruction skills.

Our Local Library.name: Library Instructional Video
Our Local Library.overview: Students create a video tutorial demonstrating how to use the library, practicing modal verbs and imperative forms.

Our Local Library.name: Digital Library Map
Our Local Library.overview: Students design a digital map of the library, labeling sections with determiners like many, all, most.
Our Local Library.general_objective: Develop digital mapping and determiner usage skills.

Our Local Library.name: Research Report
Our Local Library.overview: Students write a research report on a book they found in the library, using past tense and research vocabulary.

Our Classroom News.name: Digital Classroom Newsletter
Our Classroom News.overview: Students create a digital newsletter about class events, practicing the future tense and sequencing words.

Our Classroom News.name: Class Event Plan
Our Classroom News.overview: Students collaborate to plan an upcoming class event, using present and future tenses.

Our Classroom News.name: Script for School Play
Our Classroom News.overview: Students write and perform a short script about a class event, using the future and past tense.

Our Amazing Community.name: Community Role Posters
Our Amazing Community.overview: Students create posters about community members and their jobs, practicing the present simple tense and the present perfect tense.
Our Amazing Community.general_objective: Develop career awareness and tense application skills.

Our Amazing Community.name: Community Interview Project
Our Amazing Community.overview: Students interview community members about their work, focusing on questions with 'How long...' and 'What does...'
Our Amazing Community.general_objective: Develop interview skills and question formation.

Our Amazing Community.name: Community Job Fair Simulation
Our Amazing Community.overview: Students simulate a job fair by role-playing as community workers and using the present perfect to describe their tasks.
Our Amazing Community.general_objective: Develop role-play skills and present perfect usage.

Our Weather Report.name: Digital Weather Forecast Video
Our Weather Report.overview: Students create a digital weather forecast using the future tense and prepositions of place to describe weather changes.
Our Weather Report.general_objective: Develop weather forecasting and digital presentation skills.

Our Weather Report.name: Weather Chart Creation
Our Weather Report.overview: Students create a weather chart, labeling weather changes with the future tense.
Our Weather Report.general_objective: Develop data visualization and weather terminology skills.

Our Weather Report.name: Weather Report Presentation
Our Weather Report.overview: Students present a weather report using the future tense and weather vocabulary to the class.
Our Weather Report.general_objective: Develop public speaking and weather presentation skills.

Our Changing Forests.name: Classroom Recycling Campaign
Our Changing Forests.overview: Students create a campaign promoting recycling using the future with 'will' and imperative forms.
Our Changing Forests.general_objective: Develop environmental awareness and persuasive communication skills.

Our Changing Forests.name: Environmental Poster
Our Changing Forests.overview: Students design posters explaining environmental actions using imperative forms.
Our Changing Forests.general_objective: Develop environmental education and instructional language skills.

Our Changing Forests.name: Digital Recycling Instructions
Our Changing Forests.overview: Students create digital instructions for recycling in their community using simple present and imperative forms.
Our Changing Forests.general_objective: Develop digital instruction creation and process explanation skills.

The Talents Around Us.name: Fiestas Patrias Parade Planner
The Talents Around Us.overview: Students plan a mock Fiestas Patrias parade, using the future simple tense and the first conditional.
The Talents Around Us.general_objective: Develop event planning and conditional language skills.

The Talents Around Us.name: Fiestas Patrias Celebration Documentary
The Talents Around Us.overview: Students create a short documentary about Fiestas Patrias traditions.
The Talents Around Us.general_objective: Develop documentary production and cultural research skills.

The Talents Around Us.name: Fiestas Patrias Celebration Mural
The Talents Around Us.overview: Students collaborate to create a mural showcasing key elements of Fiestas Patrias.
The Talents Around Us.general_objective: Develop collaborative art and cultural representation skills.
